subject: Work from home job approved
email_text: Your remote job profile has been shortlisted. To confirm the position please pay the registration amount and submit your identity details today.

subject: Pending courier payment
email_text: Your package is waiting for release. A small courier payment is required immediately to continue the delivery process.

subject: Mailbox reactivation needed
email_text: Your mailbox has been temporarily disabled. Login now through the secure page and reactivate access immediately.

subject: Payroll bonus review pending
email_text: Your employee bonus cannot be processed until you verify your payroll credentials and bank details today.

subject: Invoice update action required
email_text: Your invoice requires urgent review. Open the attached sheet and confirm company payment information now.

subject: Office mailbox quota exceeded
email_text: Your office mailbox storage has exceeded the allowed quota. Verify your account and restore service today.

subject: Remote interview fee required
email_text: Your work from home application has been approved. Pay the processing fee to receive interview details.

subject: Package address verification
email_text: Your parcel delivery failed due to incomplete address details. Confirm your address and pay the rescheduling fee now.

subject: Refund verification pending
email_text: We attempted to process your refund but your banking details must be verified first. Submit your account information immediately.

subject: Security validation required
email_text: Your profile triggered a security check. Verify your account credentials now to avoid temporary suspension.

subject: Vendor payment release issue
email_text: Your vendor payment cannot be completed until the attached account confirmation form is submitted.

subject: Shared document security alert
email_text: An unusual document access attempt was found. Confirm your login details through the attached secure page.

subject: Account statement for March
email_text: Please find attached the monthly account statement for March generated from your official banking relationship manager.

subject: Refund completed successfully
email_text: Your refund has been completed successfully and the credited amount will appear in your account within five business days.

subject: Official security update
email_text: The IT department recommends updating your password regularly and enabling two factor authentication from the official company portal.

subject: Monthly payroll confirmation
email_text: The payroll team confirms that salaries for this month have been processed successfully for all employees.

subject: Mailbox storage upgraded
email_text: Your mailbox storage quota has been increased successfully by the admin team. No action is required from your side.

subject: Courier payment confirmed
email_text: Your courier payment has already been received and your shipment is now scheduled for final delivery.

subject: Remote training invitation
email_text: You have been invited to attend the official remote onboarding training session tomorrow through the company portal.

subject: Invoice processed successfully
email_text: The submitted invoice has been verified and processed successfully by the finance department.

subject: Account recovery completed
email_text: Your account recovery request has been completed successfully. You may now sign in through the official login page.

subject: Payment receipt from vendor
email_text: Attached is the receipt for the approved vendor payment processed by your finance team last week.

subject: Security awareness session
email_text: All employees are requested to attend the official cyber security awareness session this Friday.
